name: Noisy Source Gate
description: Advisory mod that recommends manual review-gating for high-noise evidence sources unless the operator has raised the source's trust.
advises_on: High-volume, low-signal channels (Slack chat, Granola/Fathom meeting transcripts) flooding the candidate store; recommends a manual gate unless the source's trust tier is operator-raised. A non-noisy source yields nothing.

config.label: Sources with operator-raised trust (skip the gate)
config.description: Source ids the operator has explicitly trusted, so the mod does NOT recommend a manual gate for them. The default high-noise set (slack/granola/fathom) is config-as-code in the mod.

requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.
Optional: an operator source-trust map to suppress the gate for raised sources.

ui.card_blurb: Suggests a manual gate for noisy sources; it suggests, never enforces.
